name: Honeyed Peach Preserves
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine peaches, sugar, and honey in a Dutch oven. Cover and let stand for 45 minutes.
2. Position the knife blade in the food processor bowl. Add orange pieces and cover. Process until finely chopped. Measure the chopped orange and add an equal amount of water. Cook covered for about 10 minutes or until the orange peel is soft. Set aside.
3. Bring peaches slowly to a boil, stirring frequently until sugar dissolves. Bring to a rapid boil and cook 15 minutes, stirring constantly. Add the orange mixture, return to a boil, and cook about 25 minutes or until the mixture registers 221 degrees on a candy thermometer; stir the mixture frequently.
